name: ibkr
description: Self-hosted marketplace for the ibkr Claude Code plugin (Interactive Brokers portfolio analysis and trading research).

plugins.name: ibkr
plugins.description: Interactive Brokers portfolio analysis and trading research: account, positions, snapshot + streaming stock/ETF quotes, official market calendars, option chains, daily history, market scans, fixed-fractional position sizing, S&P 500 breadth, combined SPY+SPX dealer gamma, a broad-market stress-lifecycle regime dashboard, and portfolio-aware canary stress-lifecycle checks. The current bundled tool surface is limited to read-only analysis and sizing. Requires the `ibkr` binary on PATH; see the project README for install and update instructions.
